title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
